nasb.text: Now the apostles and the brethren who were throughout Judea heard that the Gentiles also had received the word of God.

esv.text: Now the apostles and the brothers who were throughout Judea heard that the Gentiles also had received the word of God.

cnv.text: 使徒和在猶太的弟兄們，聽說外族人也接受了　神的道。

ccb.text: 使徒和犹太全境的弟兄姊妹都听说外族人接受了上帝的道。

csbs.text: 后来，使徒们和在犹太各地的弟兄们听说外邦人也接受了神的话语。
